item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: You're not required to use a title on the mainlist. It's a feature, not a requirement.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Why doesn't this have a title on the main list?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: There isn't enough here for me. The ending implies friendship, but not enough to make the overall piece worth it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: There is a surprising amount of emotions to unpack from such a small package here. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Concurring with akimoto here, this is delightfully simple yet emotionally complex. Good stuff rockteeth.

item.title: Junior Staff - Site Crit
item.content:encoded:
Crit/Opinion
Bye-Bye

Okay RTME lets see what you got,

Nitpicks:

It is dressed in a button down striped shirt,

button-down

its body will emit five to nine bright flashes of light.

We discussed this line, scintillate could work nicely here.

SCP-4822 became active during its visitation funeral, when it flashed eight times.

I don't think you need this comma, also another chance to rephrase "flashed eight times".

Both confirm that neither events happened.

events —> event

Thee show the subjects unwrapping Christmas presents.

Thee -> Three

Opinion: This is excellent, short and bittersweet. A prefect balance of humor, interest and wholesome sadness. A small gripe would be the semi-lackluster conprocs (but in the end sometimes the basics is all you really need). I also think the photos produced would be given a designation (-1, -A), especially since they are contained separately. Aside for the minor nitpick this is a nearly perfect piece and definitely one of my favorite articles to come out recently. To compound that, it was written as a "Bright's challenge" which in and of itself is impressive. Easy +1.



Site crit : Disclaimer: Opinions expressed in this review do not reflect the opinions of SCP Wiki staff as a whole. Please respond to DrAkimoto or contact the captain of the Site Criticism Team, SoullessSingularity, for any questions or concerns relating to this review.
Small typo in Test 09, where it's Thee and not Three. Otherwise, good SCP.

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
I wanted to write this weird thing I came up with about a year ago. So I did.

Valued Critters: None.

Regular Critters: None.

This is a boldpost for Bright's First Challenge to conceive, write, and post an SCP within 24 hours without outside help.

More of my work can be found here.
